NKJV.1: A Psalm. Oh, sing to the LORD a new song! For He has done marvelous things; His right hand and His holy arm have gained Him the victory.
NKJV.2: The LORD has made known His salvation;  His righteousness He has revealed in the sight of the nations.
NKJV.3: He has remembered His mercy and His faithfulness to the house of Israel;  All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
NKJV.4: Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth; Break forth in song, rejoice, and sing praises.
NKJV.5: Sing to the LORD with the harp, With the harp and the sound of a psalm,
NKJV.6: With trumpets and the sound of a horn; Shout joyfully before the LORD, the King.
NKJV.7: Let the sea roar, and all its fullness, The world and those who dwell in it;
NKJV.8: Let the rivers clap their hands; Let the hills be joyful together before the LORD,
NKJV.9: For He is coming to judge the earth. With righteousness He shall judge the world, And the peoples with equity.

KJV.1: A Psalm<S>4210</S>. O sing<S>7891</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S> a new<S>2319</S> song<S>7892</S>; for he hath done<S>6213</S> marvellous things<S>6381</S>: his right hand<S>3225</S>, and his holy<S>6944</S> arm<S>2220</S>, hath gotten him the victory<S>3467</S>.
KJV.2: The LORD<S>3068</S> hath made known<S>3045</S> his salvation<S>3444</S>: his righteousness<S>6666</S> hath he openly shewed<S>1540</S> in the sight<S>5869</S> of the heathen<S>1471</S>. <sup>openly: or, revealed</sup>
KJV.3: He hath remembered<S>2142</S> his mercy<S>2617</S> and his truth<S>530</S> toward the house<S>1004</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>: all the ends<S>657</S> of the earth<S>776</S> have seen<S>7200</S> the salvation<S>3444</S> of our God<S>430</S>.
KJV.4: Make a joyful noise<S>7321</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S>, all the earth<S>776</S>: make a loud noise<S>6476</S>, and rejoice<S>7442</S>, and sing<S>2167</S> praise.
KJV.5: Sing<S>2167</S> unto the LORD<S>3068</S> with the harp<S>3658</S>; with the harp<S>3658</S>, and the voice<S>6963</S> of a psalm<S>2172</S>.
KJV.6: With trumpets<S>2689</S> and sound<S>6963</S> of cornet<S>7782</S> make a joyful noise<S>7321</S> before<S>6440</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>, the King<S>4428</S>.
KJV.7: Let the sea<S>3220</S> roar<S>7481</S>, and the fulness<S>4393</S> thereof; the world<S>8398</S>, and they that dwell<S>3427</S> therein. <sup>the fulness: or, all it containeth</sup>
KJV.8: Let the floods<S>5104</S> clap<S>4222</S> their hands<S>3709</S>: let the hills<S>2022</S> be joyful<S>7442</S> together<S>3162</S>
KJV.9: Before<S>6440</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>; for he cometh<S>935</S> to judge<S>8199</S> the earth<S>776</S>: with righteousness<S>6664</S> shall he judge<S>8199</S> the world<S>8398</S>, and the people<S>5971</S> with equity<S>4339</S>.

ESV.1: Oh sing to the LORD a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand and his holy arm have worked salvation for him.
ESV.2: The LORD has made known his salvation; he has revealed his righteousness in the sight of the nations.
ESV.3: He has remembered his steadfast love and faithfulness to the house of Israel. All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
ESV.4: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth; break forth into joyous song and sing praises!
ESV.5: Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre, with the lyre and the sound of melody!
ESV.6: With trumpets and the sound of the horn make a joyful noise before the King, the LORD!
ESV.7: Let the sea roar, and all that fills it; the world and those who dwell in it!
ESV.8: Let the rivers clap their hands; let the hills sing for joy together
ESV.9: before the LORD, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.

NASB.1: A Psalm. O sing to the LORD a new song, For He has done wonderful things, His right hand and His holy arm have gained the victory for Him.
NASB.2: The LORD has made known His salvation; He has revealed His righteousness in the sight of the nations.
NASB.3: He has remembered His lovingkindness and His faithfulness to the house of Israel; All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
NASB.4: Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth; Break forth and sing for joy and sing praises.
NASB.5: Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre, With the lyre and the sound of melody.
NASB.6: With trumpets and the sound of the horn Shout joyfully before the King, the LORD.
NASB.7: Let the sea roar and all it contains, The world and those who dwell in it.
NASB.8: Let the rivers clap their hands, Let the mountains sing together for joy
NASB.9: Before the LORD, for He is coming to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness And the peoples with equity.

NLT.1:
Sing a new song to the LORD,
for he has done wonderful deeds.
His right hand has won a mighty victory;
his holy arm has shown his saving power!
NLT.2:
The LORD has announced his victory
and has revealed his righteousness to every nation!
NLT.3:
He has remembered his promise to love and be faithful to Israel.
The ends of the earth have seen the victory of our God.
NLT.4:
Shout to the LORD, all the earth;
break out in praise and sing for joy!
NLT.5:
Sing your praise to the LORD with the harp,
with the harp and melodious song,
NLT.6:
with trumpets and the sound of the ram’s horn.
Make a joyful symphony before the LORD, the King!
NLT.7:
Let the sea and everything in it shout his praise!
Let the earth and all living things join in.
NLT.8:
Let the rivers clap their hands in glee!
Let the hills sing out their songs of joy
NLT.9:
before the LORD,
for he is coming to judge the earth.
He will judge the world with justice,
and the nations with fairness.

WEB.1: A Psalm. Sing to Yahweh a new song, for he has done marvelous things! His right hand, and his holy arm, have worked salvation for him.
WEB.2: Yahweh has made known his salvation. He has openly shown his righteousness in the sight of the nations.
WEB.3: He has remembered his loving kindness and his faithfulness toward the house of Israel. All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
WEB.4: Make a joyful noise to Yahweh, all the earth! Burst out and sing for joy, yes, sing praises!
WEB.5: Sing praises to Yahweh with the harp, with the harp and the voice of melody.
WEB.6: With trumpets and sound of the ram’s horn, make a joyful noise before the King, Yahweh.
WEB.7: Let the sea roar with its fullness; the world, and those who dwell therein.
WEB.8: Let the rivers clap their hands. Let the mountains sing for joy together.
WEB.9: Let them sing before Yahweh, for he comes to judge the earth. He will judge the world with righteousness, and the peoples with equity.

CSB17.1:
A psalm. [1] Sing a new song to the LORD, ⓘ
for he has performed wonders;
his right hand and holy arm
have won him victory. ⓙ
CSB17.2:
The LORD has made his victory known;
he has revealed his righteousness
in the sight of the nations. ⓚ
CSB17.3:
He has remembered his love
and faithfulness to the house of Israel;
all the ends of the earth
have seen our God’s victory. ⓛ
CSB17.4:
Let the whole earth shout to the LORD;
be jubilant, shout for joy, and sing. ⓜ
CSB17.5:
Sing to the LORD with the lyre,
with the lyre and melodious song. ⓝ
CSB17.6:
With trumpets and the blast of the ram’s horn
shout triumphantly
in the presence of the LORD, our King. ⓐ
CSB17.7:
Let the sea and all that fills it,
the world and those who live in it, resound. ⓑ
CSB17.8:
Let the rivers clap their hands;
let the mountains shout together for joy ⓒ
CSB17.9:
before the LORD,
for he is coming to judge the earth.
He will judge the world righteously
and the peoples fairly. ⓓ

AMP.1:
A Psalm. O sing to the LORD a new song,
For He has done marvelous and wonderful things;
His right hand and His holy arm have gained the victory for Him.
AMP.2:
The LORD has made known His salvation;
He has [openly] revealed His righteousness in the sight of the nations.
AMP.3:
He has [graciously] remembered His lovingkindness and His faithfulness to the house of Israel;
All the ends of the earth have witnessed the salvation of our God.
AMP.4:
Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth;
Shout [in jubilation] and sing for joy and sing praises.
AMP.5:
Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre,
With the lyre and the sound of melody.
AMP.6:
With trumpets and the sound of the horn
Shout with joy before the King, the LORD.
AMP.7:
Let the sea thunder and roar, and all the things it contains,
The world and those who dwell in it.
AMP.8:
Let the rivers clap their hands;
Let the mountains sing together for joy and delight
AMP.9:
Before the LORD, for He is coming to judge the earth;
He will judge the world with righteousness
And the peoples with fairness.

MSG.1:
Sing to God a brand-new song.
He's made a world of wonders!
He rolled up his sleeves,
He set things right.
MSG.2:
God made history with salvation,
He showed the world what he could do.
MSG.3:
He remembered to love us, a bonus
To his dear family, Israel—indefatigable love.
The whole earth comes to attention.
Look—God's work of salvation!
MSG.4:
Shout your praises to God, everybody!
Let loose and sing! Strike up the band!
MSG.5:
Round up an orchestra to play for God,
Add on a hundred-voice choir.
MSG.6:
Feature trumpets and big trombones,
Fill the air with praises to King God.
MSG.7:
Let the sea and its fish give a round of applause,
With everything living on earth joining in.
MSG.8:
Let ocean breakers call out, "Encore!"
And mountains harmonize the finale—
MSG.9:
A tribute to God when he comes,
When he comes to set the earth right.
He'll straighten out the whole world,
He'll put the world right, and everyone in it.

NIV.1:
Psalm 98
A psalm.
Sing to the Lord a new song,
for he has done marvelous things;
his right hand and his holy arm
have worked salvation for him.
NIV.2:
The Lord has made his salvation known
and revealed his righteousness to the nations.
NIV.3:
He has remembered his love
and his faithfulness to the house of Israel;
all the ends of the earth have seen
the salvation of our God.
NIV.4:
Shout for joy to the Lord, all the earth,
burst into jubilant song with music;
NIV.5:
make music to the Lord with the harp,
with the harp and the sound of singing,
NIV.6:
with trumpets and the blast of the ram’s horn—
shout for joy before the Lord, the King.
NIV.7:
Let the sea resound, and everything in it,
the world, and all who live in it.
NIV.8:
Let the rivers clap their hands,
let the mountains sing together for joy;
NIV.9:
let them sing before the Lord,
for he comes to judge the earth.
He will judge the world in righteousness
and the peoples with equity.

NRSVCE.1:
O sing to the LORD a new song,
for he has done marvelous things.
His right hand and his holy arm
have gotten him victory.
NRSVCE.2:
The LORD has made known his victory;
he has revealed his vindication in the sight of the nations.
NRSVCE.3:
He has remembered his steadfast love and faithfulness
to the house of Israel.
All the ends of the earth have seen
the victory of our God.
NRSVCE.4:
Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth;
break forth into joyous song and sing praises.
NRSVCE.5:
Sing praises to the LORD with the lyre,
with the lyre and the sound of melody.
NRSVCE.6:
With trumpets and the sound of the horn
make a joyful noise before the King, the LORD.
NRSVCE.7:
Let the sea roar, and all that fills it;
the world and those who live in it.
NRSVCE.8:
Let the floods clap their hands;
let the hills sing together for joy
NRSVCE.9:
at the presence of the LORD, for he is coming
to judge the earth.
He will judge the world with righteousness,
and the peoples with equity.

NET.1: Sing to the LORD a new song, for he performs amazing deeds! His right hand and his mighty arm accomplish deliverance.
NET.2: The LORD demonstrates his power to deliver; in the sight of the nations he reveals his justice.
NET.3: He remains loyal and faithful to the family of Israel. All the ends of the earth see our God deliver us.
NET.4: Shout out praises to the LORD, all the earth! Break out in a joyful shout and sing!
NET.5: Sing to the LORD accompanied by a harp, accompanied by a harp and the sound of music!
NET.6: With trumpets and the blaring of the ram’s horn, shout out praises before the king, the LORD!
NET.7: Let the sea and everything in it shout, along with the world and those who live in it!
NET.8: Let the rivers clap their hands! Let the mountains sing in unison
NET.9: before the LORD! For he comes to judge the earth! He judges the world fairly, and the nations in a just manner.
